title_en: Why Europe Says 'No' To US Food Additives
title_es: Por qué Europa dice 'No' a los aditivos alimentarios de EE. UU.
hook_en: Did you know these additives are banned in Europe?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que estos aditivos están prohibidos en Europa?
key_message: Many food additives banned in Europe due to health risks are still allowed in the US, impacting public health.
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 1906: Pure Food and Drug Act signed — first federal food safety law — Impact: Banned mislabeled food but lacked enforcement power

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: US Food Deregulation: A Recipe for Obesity?
title_es: ¿Deregulación alimentaria en EE. UU.: receta para la obesidad?
hook_en: Watch how regulations fueled the obesity epidemic!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo las regulaciones alimentaron la epidemia de obesidad!
key_message: Deregulation of food safety laws in the US has contributed to an increase in obesity rates.
